name: TD Sequential Countdown
description: Countdown begins on bar 9 of a completed setup and counts to 13

buy_countdown.description: Counts up from 1 to 13 during or after a buy setup

bar_13.description: Bar 13 qualifier — ensures the low of bar 13 is less than or equal to the close of bar 8

buy_countdown.progression: each bar that satisfies the condition advances the count by 1, non-qualifying bars are skipped but do not reset the count

sell_countdown.description: Counts up from 1 to 13 during or after a sell setup

bar_13.description: Bar 13 qualifier — ensures the high of bar 13 is greater than or equal to the close of bar 8

sell_countdown.progression: each bar that satisfies the condition advances the count by 1, non-qualifying bars are skipped but do not reset the count
